v0.1.0.description: # Age of Mythology: Retold — Fall of the Trident Archipelago Randomizer An [Archipelago](https://archipelago.gg) multiworld randomizer for the **Fall of the Trident** campaign in Age of Mythology: Retold. Current version: **0.1.0** --- ## What Is This? This mod transforms the Fall of the Trident campaign into an Archipelago multiworld randomizer. Instead of progressing through the campaign in order and completing missions normally, items are shuffled into a randomized pool. You might start a scenario unable to advance beyond the Classical Age, and the only military units you can train are myth units. You might find an upgrade giving Arkantos lifesteal and a petrifying shout. **What is Archipelago?** Archipelago is a free, open-source multiworld randomizer platform that connects players across dozens of different games simultaneously. Each player randomizes their own game, and items from one game can appear in another player's world. Learn more at [archipelago.gg](https://archipelago.gg). > Archipelago also supports solo play if you want to play Fall of the Trident Randomizer on your own. --- ## Features **32 randomized scenarios** across the Greek, Egyptian, Norse, and Final campaign sections. All sections unlock independently — finding the Egyptian Scenarios item immediately opens missions 11–20 regardless of Greek progress. **Over 150 items** in the pool, including: - Hero special abilities (Arkantos lifesteal, Ajax shield bash in an area, Chiron poison arrow, Amanra reincarniating enemies as minions, and more) - Progressive Age Unlock items (Classical, Heroic, Mythic) per civilization - Unit unlock items for each civ (Hoplite, Berserk, Spearman, and more) - Section unlock items (Greek Scenarios, Egyptian Scenarios, Norse Scenarios, Atlantis Key) - Starting resource and passive income boosts - Reinforcement units that spawn in your base - Villager carry capacity and cost upgrades - Hero stat boosts (HP, Attack, Recharge Time, Regen) for major heroes **Over 150 locations** across all 32 scenarios — Victory checks and primary objectives. -Primary Objectives are indicated in the upper right corner in each scenario. Secondary and option objectives aren't locations. **Logic system** that ensures scenarios are only in logic when you have enough age unlocks and items to reasonably complete them. The game won't expect you to beat a Mythic Age scenario with nothing in your inventory. **Configurable options** including: - Starting civilization (Greek, Egyptian, or Norse) - Starting age unlock items per civilization - Final section unlock mode (beat X scenarios, Atlantis Key, or always open) - Hero abilities toggle --- ## How It Works There are two components that work together: **The AoM Mod** is what runs inside Age of Mythology: Retold. It reads a state file to apply received items at the start of each scenario (age unlocks, hero upgrades, unit unlocks, etc.) and fires objective checks to the client as you complete them. **The Archipelago Client** is a background application that connects to your Archipelago server. It writes the state file the mod reads, polls for completed objective checks during gameplay, and sends and receives items between your game and the multiworld. Due to AoM XS code limitations, checks can only be received and sent between scenarios. Sorry. If anyone has a concrete solution to this problem, please let me know! --- ## Installation ### Requirements - [Age of Mythology: Retold (Steam)](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1934680/Age_of_Mythology_Retold/) - [Archipelago](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases) 0.6.5 or later ### Steps **1. Install the AoM mod** Subscribe to the **Fall of the Trident Archipelago Randomizer** mod on the Age of Mythology: Retold mod platform and enable it in your in-game mod manager. Quit and restart AoM to activate the mod. The mod is included locally here. Put the whole extracted folder in this directory: C:\Users\[Your Name]\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\[Your Steam id Number]\mods\local **2. Install the apworld** Download `aom.apworld` from the [latest release](https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/releases/latest) and place it in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder: ``` C:\ProgramData\Archipelago\custom_worlds\ ``` **3. Launch the client** Open the Archipelago Launcher and select **Age of Mythology Retold Client**. On first launch, a folder picker will appear — navigate to and select your AoM Retold user data folder. This is the folder named after your Steam ID and it's a series of numbers like 12315152: ``` C:\Users\[YourName]\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\[SteamID]\ ``` **4. Connect to your server** Connect to your Archipelago server using the client as you would with any other AP game. The client will automatically install the required trigger files into your game folder on first connect. **5. Play** Launch scenarios through the in-game mod, not the vanilla campaign menu. The Archipelago client must be running and connected while you play. --- ## Generating a Game To generate a multiworld, each player needs a YAML configuration file. Generate a template from the Archipelago launcher or copy the example below as a starting point. A template YAML with default settings is included in this repository: [`Age_Of_Mythology_Retold.yaml`](https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/releases/download/v0.1.0/Age.Of.Mythology.Retold.yaml) Key options to consider: - `starting_scenarios` — which civilization to begin with (greek is recommended for new players) - `final_scenarios` — what unlocks the last two missions (beat_x_scenarios is recommended) - `x_scenarios` — how many missions to beat before the final section opens (default: 10) - `hero_abilities` — include hero special ability items in the pool (recommended: true). The randomizer is much harder with this turned off. --- ## Notes - The mod must be **enabled** in the AoM Retold mod manager before launching a scenario. Game updates may disable mods — re-enable after any update. - The client must remain running and connected throughout your play session for checks to register. --- ## Credits Developed by **1-800-thewolf** Thanks to the Archipelago and Age of Mythology Modding community for tooling, documentation, and support.
v0.1.0.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
![randomizer thumbnail](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/382197b5-8b04-421f-a225-e686d29af7ba)

v0.1.1
-Balance changes including reducing Arkantos' lifesteal %.
-Bug fix for scenario 25. Welcoming Committee which prevented checks from sending there.
-Improvements to the client allowing for `/scenarios`, showing which scenarios are beaten, in progress, and untouched

[See the apworld overview here](https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago)

v0.1.2.description:
![randomizer thumbnail](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7627ca05-40a2-4c59-923c-a4bf9767e266)

- Bugfix to scenario 9 failing to send checks.
- Improvements to the `/scenarios` command so it lists the campaign blocks that are unlocked along with your progress on the different scenarios.
- Improvements to the ReadMe, providing instructions for if the custom campaign doesn't appear

[See more info on the project here](https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/tree/main)


**To get the update to the map, please update the mod in-game or use the zipped mod in the release**
v0.1.2.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.1.2

v0.2.0.description:
![randomizer thumbnail](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/007eb41d-2508-4fb7-a611-d8608edd8fee)

# 🎲🌩️ random major god
An option to randomize the major god for each scenario at generation time. Your seed determines every assignment so retrying a scenario always gives you the same god. The assigned god changes your available units, ages, and minor gods, making every seed play dramatically differently.

- The God Force Change sub-option (on by default) ensures the assigned god is always different from the vanilla one, with a 50% chance to come from a different civilization
- **Atlanteans are fully playable** when godsanity is enabled, including Kronos, Oranos, and Gaia with all their units and myth units
- A new `/gods` client command shows all 32 god assignments for your current seed
- God assignments are visible in the spoiler log

## 🐉 Myth Unit Sanity 
An option to forbid all myth units at the start of every playthrough. To unlock them, you need to find one of nine new tier items:

Can train Greek Classical/Heroic/Mythic Myth Units
Can train Egyptian Classical/Heroic/Mythic Myth Units
Can train Norse Classical/Heroic/Mythic Myth Units

## 📊 New Client Command 
Type commands into the aom ap client window to see what you have unlocked for each civilization, to see the random major gods for each scenario, to see which scenarios are beaten or in progress,

## Bug Fixes
Several bug fixes, mostly found thanks to the community. (Thanks community!) but here are some highlights:
- Sometimes the Atlantis Key was put in the item pool even though beat_x_scenarios was turned on
- Reinforcements failed to spawn on some scenarios
- Some objectives failed to sent items 

 ### ⚠️ v0.2.0 is not save-compatible with v0.1.0. In-progress runs from the previous version cannot be continued.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.1.2...v0.2.0
v0.2.0.title: Age of Mythology: Retold Archipelago Randomizer — v0.2.0

v0.3.0.description: # New Features ## 🏪 Gem Shop Spend Gems earned from scenario victories at a replayable shop to buy items and hints across four unlockable tiers. (Turn this off in your options if it's not your cup of tea) ## ⚡ Traps 20 traps causing hostile god powers to be used against you, from Meteor to Restoration on the enemies. ## 🏛️ Building Transforms for random major god An option to transform your military buildings to match your random civilization's architecture. ## ⚔️ Progressive Military & Economy Upgrades New progressive economy and military technology items that start you with better tech based on how many you've found. # Improvements ## 📊 Smarter Client Commands `/gods` now shows the expected age per scenario and correctly identifies missions with no age requirement; /civ commands now show the max age you can reach for each; /progress is more accurate with more helpful information. ## 🪰 Several bug fixes To name a few: 🏹Sentry Towers hopefully attack at range when they are supposed to ✅ Fixed some cases where checks failed to send. 🔋 Fixed some edge cases with random major gods where extra god powers were granted ### ⚠️ v0.3.0 is not save-compatible with v0.2.0. In-progress runs from the previous version cannot be continued. ### 🌍 This update requires the updated mod version. Use v.0.3.0 of the mod **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0
v0.3.0.title: Age of Mythology: Retold Archipelago Randomizer — v0.3.0

v0.3.3.description:
### Bug fixes including but not limited to the following issues:
- Checks are sent in a new world based on cached information from the previous play session
- Buildings are not transformed with random major god when they should be
- Buildings are destroyed in scenario 7 before you can take control of them
- Some traps like Lightning Storm failing to invoke when they should
- Other niche edge cases

v0.4.0.description: # 🏳 Two New Campaigns ## 🧌 New Atlantis (NA) Opt-in or out of all 12 scenarios. ## 🐗 Golden Gift (GG) Opt-in or out of all 4 scenarios. # ⚙️ Campaign & Civilization Selection - ✅New options to enable/disable individual campaigns or campaign blocks. For example, you can turn on New Atlantis and turn off the Greek and Egyptian scenarios in Fall of the Trident. - ⛔New option to turn off individual civilizations. Feel free to remove Egyptian or Norse major gods from the randomizer. - 🏺 New Relic Items: Find items that boost you every time you capture a relic. Get boosts such as All Units and Buildings get +1 Regen for each relic you capture or Get a Significant Trickle of Gold for Each Relic Captured. --- ⚠️ v0.3.0 is not save-compatible with v0.2.0. In-progress runs from the previous version cannot be continued. 🌍 This update requires the updated mod version. Use v.0.3.0 of the mod **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.3.4...v0.4.0

v0.4.1.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.4.1

v0.5.0.description:
# Relicsanity
- An option to turn every relic in the campaigns into its own check by garrisoning it in a temple. 
- 174 total relic locations across all campaigns: 103 in Fall of the Trident, 51 in The New Atlantis, 20 in The Golden Gift.
- Special thanks to @Martienju for cataloguing every single relic and wiring up every single relic with its own trigger.

### Other minor bugfixing and qol changes

# ⚠️ This is a pre-release and has received very little testing so far. 
## The subscription-mod won't work with this pre-release. Use the attached aom randomizer campaign and drop it into your local mod folder.
A big reason this is a pre-release is because every new check needs to be tested. Some checks might not work, but most should. If you want to help check all of the 174 new relic locations, let me know how it goes. This version will be officially released after some bug hunting.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.3.4...v0.5.0
v0.5.0.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.5.0

v0.5.1.description: # 🏺 Relicsanity An option to turn every relic in the campaigns into its own check by garrisoning it in a temple. - 174 total relic locations across all campaigns: 103 in Fall of the Trident, 51 in The New Atlantis, 20 in The Golden Gift. - Special thanks to @Martienju for cataloguing every single relic, wiring up every single relic with its own trigger, and helping test them all. - Thanks also @shrimplylyasha for going through the campaigns and testing so many relics. ## ⚖️ QoL Features - An Archipelago Relic count shows how many relics still need to be found within each scenario (only when relicsanity is turned on) - Better color formatting for relic item buffs - Cleaned up the yaml to be easier to use - Balance changes to better handle an inordinate number of items in the pool. If you really want to, go ahead and turn on all 5 campaigns + relicsanity - Other small qol improvements ## 🐜 Bug Fixes - Many bug fixes were squashed via pre-release testing, but a few more were addressed in this release - Fixed a bug where changing server wiped out your items. Now the game is tracked via slot and seed. If for some reason you want to play the same seed with the same slot on the same server, run the `purge_aom_cache` command first, otherwise, you'll get your items from your last playthrough. - Fixed a bug that allowed you to advance ages past what items had allowed. - Other small bugfixes --- ⚠️ This version is not save-compatible with previous versions. In-progress runs from the previous version cannot be continued. 🌍 This update requires the updated mod version. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.4.1...v0.5.1
v0.5.1.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.5.1

v0.5.3.description:
- More bugfixes 
- More descriptive item and location names. 
- More niche cases where you'd only get 1 god to choose when advancing ages. 
- Fixes for occasional unobtainable items. 
- Better logic for New Atlantis and Golden Gift
- This patch requires the latest version of the mod

⚠️This patch is incompatible with older versions
v0.5.3.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v0.5.3

v1.0.0.description: Here it is! After an intense and exciting sprint, I'm pleased to announce version 1.0.0! This is a comprehensive overhaul of the Age of Mythology campaigns including these major features: ## Features - 🪙 200+ items - 🏰 400+ locations - 🚫 The option to turn off most of those 400+ locations for a more focused or shorter experience - 🗺️ 5 toggleable campaigns including the Greek, Egyptian, and Norse branches of Fall of the Trident, The Golden Gift, and the entire New Atlantis campaign - ⚔️ Exciting hero special ability items ranging from Arkantos petrifying enemies with shouts, to Amanra reincarnating slain enemies as minions, to Kastor undermining buildings with his attacks. Also, feel free to turn these off if you want a more mundane experience. - 🧌Unit unlock items - 🏛️ Progressive age unlock items - ✨ Many more fun items ranging from passive income, to starting with reinforcements, to each captured relic granting regeneration, to Arkantos is a house. - 💎 The Gem Shop to purchase items or hints with gems earned by beating scenarios - 🏺 Relicsanity if you want every relic to be a check - 🎲 Random major gods - 🌩️ Hostile god powers as traps - 🧰 Robust client commands ## How do I play? I made a 6 minute Video Tutorial: > https://youtu.be/Tjp0x-ZtOP0 The Read Me has more details, but the basic steps are these: 1. Setup Archipelago 2. Setup the latest aom.apworld in your custom_worlds folder 3. Get the Age of Mythology Campaign Archipelago Randomizer mod from within AoM --- ## Credits Developed by **1-800-thewolf** Thanks to the Archipelago and Age of Mythology Modding community for tooling, documentation, and support. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v0.5.3...v1.0.0
v1.0.0.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description:
- New yaml option to choose the number of advancement items in each shop. Set to zero to have the shop only have trap, filler, and useful items. Beware setting it high, as you may lock yourself out if you don't buy the advancement items.
- New aom client command `/fix_aom_folder` that lets you easily choose the correct aom directory if you chose it wrong.
⚠️This patch may not work with older in-progress games
v1.0.1.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.0.1 hotfix

v1.0.2.description:
This hotfix focuses on balance changes. 
- 🐉 Nearly all myth unit reinforcement items only spawn 1 unit now; no more 2 Fire Giant + 2 Collosi starts. Even weaker myth units like Trolls or Anubites only spawn 1.
- 🏺 Slight reductions to some relic items for stat/relic. They're still very strong, especially if you stack them, but they shouldn't overwhelm you with relative avatar strength now.
- 💎 The Gem Shop now defaults to zero advancement items at all.
- 🗑️ New yaml option to force filler items to be local.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2
v1.0.2.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.0.2 hotfix

v1.1.0.description: ## Option to lock individual scenarios behind Scenario Keys ## Improved aom ap client window with new tabs ## Other bugfixes and QoL improvements including these: - Released checks failed to show correctly in aom ap client window - In-game message box no longer pops up if you already checked that location **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0

Fix to force local yaml setting and replaced it with forced local percentage option.

v1.1.1.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.1.1

v1.1.2.description: ## 1 step closer to perfection ### 💪 Improvements - Better first time setup. Just the aom ap client guesses your aom folder and you just confirm that it's correct. Hopefully this cuts down on first time setup confusion. - Better AP GUI layout - Easier to read text on the Scenarios, Civilizations, and Relics tabs - Killing Kronos early before Gaia shows up now triggers the locations for summoning Gaia, killing Kronos, and beating the mission - Better handling scenario keys ### 🪰 Bugfixes - Issues related to age advancement including not being able to advance when you should and being able to when you shouldn't - Issue related to `/progress` command showing "NA" before most scenarios - Issue related to aom.apworld locking down the host yaml file - Missing relic locations in NA 11 - Missing relic location in scenario 27 - Failure to register captured relics in FotT 17. --- 👍 This version is compatible with v1.0.0 and higher current games **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2
v1.1.2.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.1.2

v1.2.0.description:
## New Civilizations!
### 🐉Chinese
### 🥷 Japanese
### 🛕 Aztecs

## Yes, you can play these pantheons even without the DLC

> With the exception of some visual discrepancies, Japanese and Aztecs are actually **FULLY PLAYABLE** even **WITHOUT THE DLC**
 
> Chinese are playable without the DLC, but Favored Land doesn't work, which drastically reduces their viability.

## Playable DLC Gods 🍓 Demeter and 🐗 Freyr
## Yes, you can play these even without the DLC

> With the exception of some visual discrepancies, Demeter and Freyr are actually **FULLY PLAYABLE** even **WITHOUT THE DLC**

👍 Note that if you have the DLC, any of the DLC should work seamlessly.

### Other improvements and bugfixes including
- Improved ap gui with clickable buttons
- Key Bundles replaced with Key Rings. When a Key Ring is found, it lists all the individual scenarios unlocked
- Killing Kronos early now just wins the scenario and auto-collects the remaining checks in NA 12
- Fixed bug related to age unlocks
- Fixed incorrect minor gods assigned to some major gods (Hades, back away from Hera!)
- Fixed missing relics in FoTT 27 and GG 1

## ⚠️This patch is incompatible with older in-progress games

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.1.2...v1.2.0
v1.2.0.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.2.0

v1.3.0.description:
## New Civilizations!
### 🐉Chinese
### 🥷 Japanese
### 🛕 Aztecs

## Yes, you can play these pantheons even without the DLC
…but, for best results, get their DLC. For you who have the DLC, they work without issue!
Without… some graphics won’t look right and some mechanics won’t work so play at your own risk if you don't have the DLC.

> Without Chinese DLC, Favored Land won't work for you.
 > Without Japanese DLC, Experience Points won't work for you.
 > Without Aztecs DLC, Tonalli favor won't work for you.

## Playable DLC Gods 🍓 Demeter and 🐗 Freyr

> These will not look or work correctly without the DLC. Buy the DLC for best results

👍 Note that if you have the DLC, any of the DLC should work seamlessly.

## 💎 New Gem Shop Layout
- The Gem Shop now lives in the AoM AP Client window.
- Once you have enough Shop Info Upgrades, the shop value with the most items gains a special sheen.
- Fully bought out shops are grayed out.
- If your seed has an enough gems in it, you can unlock a Shop E after buying out every other shop.
- Shop E has 4 decks of cards and you get the option to buy the top card on any deck and gain its item or hint.

## 👣 💬 Better Logic and Communication
- Logic more strategically handles individual items for individual scenarios. For example, if you have a ton of Odysseus items, the Fall of the Trident scenarios featuring Odysseus might enter logic earlier. If, then, Odysseus joins the campaign, a bunch of other scenarios might enter logic.
- Campaign Branches with at least 1 scenario in logic gain a sheen on the Scenarios and Relics tabs. 
- Scenarios in logic, based on your current items, gain a sheen on the Scenarios tab, under their campaign branch sub-tab.
- Fully completed scenarios are grayed out
- Fully completed campaign branches are grayed out on Scenarios and Relics tabs

### ⬆️ Other improvements and bugfixes
- Now FotT 31 and 32 only require the Atlantis Key (and not individual scenario keys as well)
- New Titan Age items per civilization. To reach the Titan Age, you must also be able to reach the Mythic Age.
- New progressive Wonder items which provide stacking benefits based on how many you get:
          1. Build Wonders in Mythic Age
          2. Wonders cost 20% less
          3. Wonders build 35% faster
          4. Wonders buildable anywhere
          5. Wonders buildable any age
          6. Wonders cost 40% less
- Buildings evenly distribute between valid options when transforming for random gods (hopefully you get an even spread, now, instead of 4 stables)
- Killing Prometheus early wins the scenario in NA 7
- Bug with Well of Urd relic
- Bug preventing Chinese from Timeshifting buildings
- Renamed some relicsanity locations to be clearer
- Cleaned up and reorganized yaml

## ⚠️This patch is incompatible with older in-progress games and yamls

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.1.2...v1.3.0
v1.3.0.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.3.0

v1.3.1.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.3.1 hotfix

v1.3.2.description:
## 👍 Fully compatible with current games
Please update as this fixes a bug related to reaching fott 32

### Balance changes and QoL
- Reduced favor trickle rates
- Chaneque starting army replaced with Centzon
- Gem hints include relic locations now
- GUI trickle rates consolidated
- Higher default trap rate to address overly large starting armies
- Lock message attempts to detect if you need to restart aom and advise you to do so.

### Bugfixes
- Fixed fott 31 and 32 requiring keys that weren't placed in the multiworld
- Fixed Infestation trap so it places anywhere
- Fixed some starting armies that failed to spawn when they should
- Fixed buildings failing to convert to the new civ in fott 7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2
v1.3.2.title: Age of Mythology Retold Archipelago Randomizer v1.3.2 hotfix
